name: Dacetuzumab
description: Dacetuzumab has been used in trials studying the treatment of Multiple Myeloma, Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma, Leukemia, Lymphocytic, Chronic, and Lymphoma, Large B-Cell, Diffuse.

interactions.name: Belimumab
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Dacetuzumab is combined with Belimumab.

interactions.name: Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated)
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated) can be decreased when used in combination with Dacetuzumab.

interactions.name: Yellow fever vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Yellow fever vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Dacetuzumab.

interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Corynebacterium diphtheriae toxoid antigen (formaldehyde inactivated) can be decreased when used in combination with Dacetuzumab.
